items.title: Klarna Takes Aim At Premium Credit Cards With Its New Membership Program
items.description: For about $220, members will get media subscriptions and cash back; and for $540 a year, access to airport lounges, the buy now, pay later provider said.

items.title: Jim Cramer on Mastercard: “You Can Put This One on Auto”
items.description: Mastercard Incorporated (NYSE:MA) is one of the stocks in focus in the game plan Jim Cramer shared. Cramer expects the company to report an “enviable quarter.” He remarked: “Thursday morning, we’ve got another company that should report an enviable quarter, and that is MasterCard. You can put this one on auto. MasterCard’s going to be […]

items.title: Visa Q3 Preview: Could Credit Card Stock Be 'Poised To Snap Back To Its Winning Ways?'
items.description: Visa looks to piggyback off a strong earnings report from American Express and show strength in consumer spending.
